title: Kasapreko
description: kasapreko.com zoominfo.com/c/kasapreko-company-ltd/113558803 Kasapreko PLC is Ghana's leading herbal beverage manufacturer, founded in 1989 by Dr. Kwabena Adjei in a garage in Nungua, Accra, and today grown into a multinational company with over 500 employees, 100+ product SKUs, and exports to 16 countries worldwide. The company pioneered the first scientifically formulated herbal-based alcoholic beverage in Ghana — Alomo Bitters — which became its flagship product and was named by CNN Money as one of the top 5 emerging brands in the world in 2013. ISO 22000:2005 certified and a member of the prestigious Ghana Club 100, Kasapreko produces bitters, whisky, gin, liqueur, brandy, wine, soft drinks, and water, with active expansion into East Africa including Kenya
